title: Water Mod
description: Adds a water block which can be made into water sticks, then a water sword!
body:
# Water mod! (Because the only thing water is used for in minecraft is mlg!)

## Features:
**Water Block:** Crafted with a water bucket you get a **water block!** when placed it turns into water!

**Water Stick:** Crafted with 2 water blocks you get a water stick! useless on its own, but **vital** to crafting the **Water Sword!**

**Water Sword:** Crafted with 1 water stick and 2 water blocks you get the **Water Sword!**, 
the water sword deals 1000 damage (instakill) but can only be used once, use it wisely...

# Recipe Images:
![Water Recipe (1 water bucket)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd01f69f37d7c6a2dece9e87d8aa750c92720b49_0.webp)

![Water Stick Recipe (2 water blocks on top of eachother)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d27d07a96428b0df028f37e6a4069ad480300617.png)

![Water sword Recipe (1 stick on middle bottom and 2 water blocks ontop)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b0a7b3ee98165dbcb551fc507c714a742164ac1.png)
